ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction took place */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the invoice */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost if applicable */,
  "invoice_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "invoice_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the item */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger a purchase order */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., '10x20x30') */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "last_purchased_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery in days */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., 'Net 30') */,
  "rating" REAL /* Supplier rating based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "preferred_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., 'brick and mortar', 'online') */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales at the store */,
  "average_daily_sales" REAL /* Average daily sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level of the product in the store */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the stock level was last updated */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date for the next reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the manager is responsible for */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Manager's performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'received', 'canceled') */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who placed the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order item */,
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_items_purchase_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the return is associated with */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product returned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Total amount refunded */,
  "return_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'manager', 'sales', 'inventory', 'admin') */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'login', 'logout', 'action') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., 'view', 'edit', 'delete') */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
